name.label: Name
name.description: An optional label shown on the node in the editor.

agent.label: Agent
agent.description: Binds this MCP server to the agent configuration it extends.

serverName.label: Server name
serverName.description: Sets a unique name for this server, used in tool names as mcp__<name>__<tool>; cannot be 'flow'.

transport.label: Transport
transport.description: Chooses how to reach the server: a local command (stdio) or a remote URL (http/sse).

command.label: Command
command.description: Sets the executable to run for stdio transport (for example: npx, node, python).

args.label: Arguments
args.description: Lists arguments passed to the stdio command, separated by comma or newline.

url.label: URL
url.description: Sets the server URL for http or sse transport.

headerName.label: Auth header (http/sse)
headerName.description: Sets the header the secret is sent in for http/sse (default Authorization: Bearer).

envName.label: Env variable (stdio)
envName.description: Sets the environment variable the secret is provided as for stdio.

timeout.label: Timeout (ms)
timeout.description: Sets the maximum milliseconds per tool call before the SDK aborts it; values under 1000 are ignored.

alwaysLoad.label: Always load tools
alwaysLoad.description: Always includes this server's tools in the prompt and blocks startup until it connects.

preApproveAll.label: Pre-approve all tools
preApproveAll.description: Pre-approves every tool on this server so calls skip the approval prompt.

secret.label: Token / API key
secret.description: Holds a token or API key for this server, sent as a Bearer header (http/sse) or an env var (stdio).
